description: The ultimate audio visualization app that brings your music to life with captivating visuals, analyzing the audio's frequency and amplitude to generate bars that represent the volume of each Hertz channel, with color-coded bars to indicate the volume level of each channel.

description: A lightweight Firefox extension that records how much time you spend on websites with a quick popup, an options page for settings and data management, and a dashboard for time by site. Available on the Firefox Add-ons store.

description: A full-stack task management application that allows users to create accounts, manage multiple lists, and add items on each list. Users can mark items as completed or incomplete, as well of editing and deleting both lists and tasks.
